top_signals.title: Strait of Hormuz Ship Transits Are Rising Thanks to Help From US
top_signals.summary: Shipowners are increasingly optimistic about a pickup in traffic through the Strait of Hormuz after more vessels left the waterway this week with the US providing information to aid those making the journey.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Quantinuum Is Said to Weigh Boosting IPO Size and Price Range
top_signals.summary: Honeywell International Inc.-backed quantum computing company Quantinuum Inc. is considering increasing the size of its initial public offering, according to a person familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Wall Street Dumps Crash Hedges as Most-Shorted Stocks Jump 30%
top_signals.summary: Caution has become the most expensive position on Wall Street.
